metadata.title: Blockchain leg - policy-capture loop + stablecoin deficit rail
metadata.provenance: Web-verified (CNBC/Bessent, BeInCrypto, DefiLlama, Axios/CNBC Fairshake, Treasury press). Grading links spec-crypto-sec-epstein.json.

finding: Blockchain is wired into the fiscal core: GENIUS forces stablecoins to hold Treasuries, making stablecoin growth a structural new buyer of US debt (deficit-financing rail) per Treasury Sec Bessent; and a Fairshake-funded policy-capture loop (industry money -> Congress -> GENIUS/CLARITY -> token value -> money). BTC is one of few assets UP in gold (real adoption); selective-enforcement/threat-actor threads graded in spec-crypto-sec-epstein.json.
